tasks.title: Review AI briefing & act on insights

Reach out personally to all 5 cold subscribers via a direct 1-on-1 Telegram or LINE message from Harvest introducing himself and offering a free 15-minute strategy call to accelerate movement through the funnel.

With 11 YouTube Shorts ready to publish, manually select the top 3 most compelling ones and schedule them across the next 3 days with custom thumbnails and keyword-optimized titles to boost early traction.

Launch a new paid traffic initiative — set up a small Facebook or TikTok ad campaign targeting Bangkok-based traders with a $10–$20/day budget to drive fresh subscribers since zero new leads joined yesterday.

Create and post 1 personal behind-the-scenes story from Harvest on Instagram or Facebook today — showing a real trade, P&L, or student win — to build trust and generate organic lead inquiries beyond the automated content.
